title: Linear drive apparatus
abstract: The present device relates to a linear drive apparatus comprising the following structure: a housing (1); and, located inside the housing (1): an electric motor (2), a transmission gear (3) which meshes with an output gear on an output shaft of the electric motor (2), and a gear shaft (4) and a linear motion assembly (5); the transmission gear (3) is mounted on the gear shaft (4), the linear motion assembly (5) is mounted in such a way as to cooperate with the transmission gear (3), and converts rotational motion of the transmission gear (3) to linear motion; wherein an axis of the linear motion assembly is arranged in the same plane as an axis of the electric motor output shaft and an axis of the gear shaft. The linear drive apparatus provided by the present device has the advantages of a compact structure, small volume, light weight and good heat dissipation effect.
claims:
Claims Patent claims A linear drive apparatus, comprising: a housing and, located inside the housing: an electric motor; a transmission gear meshed with an output gear on an output shaft of the electric motor, the transmission gear being mounted on a gear shaft located inside the housing; and a linear motion assembly, which is fitted to the transmission gear and converts rotational motion of the transmission gear to linear motion; characterized in that an axis of the linear motion assembly is arranged in the same plane as an axis of the electric motor output shaft and an axis of the gear shaft. The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 1, char Â¬ acterized in that the transmission gear is a cam gear. The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 2, char Â¬ acterized in that the cam gear comprises a cam gear part and a cam groove part; the cam gear part meshes with the output gear of the electric motor. The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 3, char Â¬ acterized in that the cam gear part has a weight-saving hole. The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 3, char Â¬ acterized in that the cam groove part has a groove inner wall close to a central axis of the cam gear and a groove outer wall remote from the central axis of the cam gear. 6. The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 3, char Â¬ acterized in that one end of the cam groove part is an open groove, while the other end is a closed groove. 

 The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 3, char Â¬ acterized in that the linear motion assembly comprises an adjusting rod, a connecting rod structure, a bearing, a magnet assembly and a sensor; the connecting rod structure is mounted on the ad Â¬ justing rod; the bearing, the magnet assembly and the sensor are all mounted on the connecting rod structure; and the bearing is located in the cam groove part, so as to convert rotational motion of the cam gear to linear motion of the linear motion assembly. The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 7, char Â¬ acterized in that an axis of the adjusting rod is arranged in the same plane as the axis of the electric motor output shaft and the axis of the gear shaft. The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 8, char Â¬ acterized in that an axis of the bearing is arranged in the same plane as the axis of the adjusting rod, the axis of the electric motor output shaft, and the axis of the gear shaft. The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 1, char Â¬ acterized in that the axis of the bearing is arranged in the same plane as the axis of the linear motion assembly, the axis of the electric motor output shaft, and the axis of the gear shaft . The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 7, char Â¬ acterized in that the sensor is a non-contact sensor. The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 1, char Â¬ acterized in that the linear drive apparatus also comprises a cooling water path which surrounds the linear motion assembly . 13. The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 12, char Â¬ acterized in that the cooling water path is located in the housing . 14. The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 1, char Â¬ acterized in that the linear drive apparatus also comprises a limiting pin disposed inside the housing; the transmission gear will abut the limiting pin upon rotation to a certain angle, thereby realizing mechanical stoppage. 15. The linear drive apparatus as claimed in claim 1, char Â¬ acterized in that the linear drive apparatus also comprises: a return spring mounted on the gear shaft, the return spring being used for return of the transmission gear; an end cover fitted to the housing, and an adjusting head fixed to one end of the linear motion assembly.
